description: Style NoteJust the pair for a weekend by the pool - this pair of sandals for men from franco leone are a closet essential. Hate your claustrophobic formal shoes after a long day at work? Switch to this pair as soon as you're home. These look good with shorts, PJs or casual pants - need more reasons to snag this pair?. Product DetailsWide brown strap that covers the forefoot and the midfootHas a brand button and perforation styling on the strapHas a soft footbed with print at the heelTPU outsole with an upraised heel, has oval nubs and grooves all overMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
